role.title: Program Operations Manager, Human Data
role.location_preference: Either — San Francisco, CA or New York City, NY (open to relocation to both)

work_authorization.sponsorship_note: Currently on OPT/STEM OPT; will require H-1B sponsorship. Anthropic explicitly lists visa sponsorship on this posting.

standard_greenhouse_questions.earliest_start_date: 4–6 weeks after offer (relocation to SF or NYC)
standard_greenhouse_questions.note_on_yoe: 3 years of direct program operations experience (InGenius: 20+ programs, 10+ vendors, 600+ participants; Vestas: M&A data migration, global onboarding; ODN: leave case audit and executive reporting). JD requires 4+; applicant is within 1 year of stated minimum.

diversity_questions.note: Fill per personal preference — Anthropic Greenhouse forms typically include voluntary EEOC fields (gender, race/ethnicity, veteran status, disability). These are optional and confidential.
